full_content:
# Report Depth and Prime Builder Context Standard — Pointer (HYG-027)

> **Deduplicated (FAB-05 / HYG-027).** The full Report Depth and Prime Builder
> Context Standard is maintained canonically in
> [`report-depth.md`](report-depth.md). This file previously duplicated that
> content verbatim, creating a lockstep-edit hazard. The content was
> consolidated into `report-depth.md`; this file now points to it.
>
> This file path is retained because the governance-adoption check
> (`platform_tests/scripts/test_groundtruth_governance_adoption.py`) and Loyal
> Opposition skill frontmatter (`governance: report-depth-prime-builder-context`)
> reference it. Consult [`report-depth.md`](report-depth.md) for the active
> Loyal Opposition report-depth contract.

## Copyright

explicit_change_request: FAB-05 rule-file retirement approved by owner: dispositions via AskUserQuestion 2026-06-10 (DELIB-FAB05-REMEDIATION-20260610); concrete-content approval via AskUserQuestion 2026-06-11 (Approve all - packets, WIs, commit). HYG-027: replaced the duplicated content with a pointer stub to canonical report-depth.md (pointer-not-delete: the file is referenced by test_groundtruth_governance_adoption.py + skill frontmatter).
change_reason: FAB-05 rule-file retirement (HYG-018/026/027/038); bridge gtkb-fab-05-rule-file-retirement GO at -004; DELIB-FAB05-REMEDIATION-20260610. Retires era-stranded + contradictory auto-loaded rule content (poller runbook, Cursor-era index paths, duplicated normative blocks, deleted-work_list.md repoint).
